calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER SERVICE EMPLOYEES INTERNATIONAL UNION'S Petition To Compel Arbitration is GRANTED. No opposition filed. The court awards $1,390 in fees and costs.

Order signed after hearing.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
